channel.title: Researches on Anirudh Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Researches on Anirudh Vemula

item.title: Research
item.description: Check out news page for latest updates and my scholar page for a complete list. Publications Preprints Planning, Learning and Reasoning Framework for Robot Truck Unloading Fahad Islam*, Anirudh Vemula*, Sung-Kyun Kim, Andrew Dornbush, Oren Salzman, Maxim Likhachev Under review (arxiv) Conference Publications Provably Efficient Imitation Learning from Observation Alone Wen Sun, Anirudh Vemula, Byron Boots, J. Andrew Bagnell ICML 2019 (Oral) (arxiv, code) Acceptance rate: 22% (Oral 5%)
